details.description: Missing await on async store.dispatch() for DAMAGE_LIFE drain. dispatch() is async but not awaited here, so life drain may not complete before get_life_essence() check on line 343, reading stale life and skipping death check.
Missing await on recursive _request_next_card() at end of _resolve_choice(). The async coroutine is fire-and-forget, and is_busy=false on line 703 before the call allows overlapping card requests.
_BIOME_DISPLAY_NAMES missing iles_mystiques (the 8th biome). Merlin intro speech for this biome will produce garbled text.
details.suggested_fix: Add iles_mystiques: les iles mystiques to the dictionary

details.description: Type mismatch in process_card(): expects String-encoded effects (DAMAGE_LIFE:5) but MerlinCardSystem provides Dictionary effects ({type: DAMAGE_LIFE, amount: 5}). The typeof != TYPE_STRING check silently rejects all Dictionary effects.
details.suggested_fix: Align effect formats between the two resolution paths

details.description: Transient MerlinGaugeSystem instance created in build_default_state() just to call build_default_gauges(). Creates a new RefCounted every time state is rebuilt.
details.suggested_fix: Make build_default_gauges() static or cache the instance

details.description: Fallback _randi_range() formula is mathematically flawed: from + int(randf() * float(N)) % N can produce biased results and randf()=1.0 edge case.
details.suggested_fix: Use randi_range(from, to) built-in or from + (randi() % (to - from + 1))

details.description: In _apply_effect() ADD_REPUTATION branch, directly calls effects._apply_faction_reputation() crossing encapsulation. Could cause inconsistent faction context updates.
details.suggested_fix: Route through dispatch or extract faction update into shared helper

details.description: Null reference risk: _reset_ai_for_new_run() accesses merlin_ai_node.session_contexts.clear() without checking if session_contexts property exists on the node.
Dead reference to removed Flux system: reads run.get(flux) for tension. Flux was removed; tension is now in run.hidden.tension. RAG tension context is always empty.
Dead reference to removed Souffle system: center option cost=1 with comment Centre costs Souffle. Souffle was removed.
details.suggested_fix: Remove cost field or repurpose to valid current system

details.description: pick_minigame_for_field() uses field.hash() % size, always returning same minigame for same field. Defeats purpose of multiple minigame options per lexical field.
details.suggested_fix: Use randi() or accept card_index for variation

details.description: Dot notation access on dictionary (entry.tag, entry.context_default) in configure_from_registry(). Fragile if dict comes from JSON.
ClassDB.class_exists(MerlinOmniscient) is dead code: MerlinOmniscient is a GDScript class_name, never registered in ClassDB. Only the fallback script-loading path on line 99 executes.
details.suggested_fix: Remove ClassDB branch, use MerlinOmniscient.new() directly

details.description: build_default_factions() initializes all factions to 0.0 but game design says starting rep is 20 (FACTION_SCORE_START). Anyone calling reset() gets Hostile factions instead of Neutral.
Save default profile sets faction_rep to 0.0, but store default is 20. Fresh profile load returns Hostile factions, causing hostile penalties on first run.
generate_npc_card() produces only 2 options but bible requires 3. If consumed without _ensure_3_options(), UI may crash on index 2 access.
details.suggested_fix: Add third option or ensure card passes through _ensure_3_options()

details.description: Thread-unsafe stat reads: _update_stats() locks mutex for writes, but get_model_info() reads stats without locking, creating potential data race.
details.suggested_fix: Lock mutex in get_model_info() or copy stats under lock

details.description: log_aspect_shifted() references removed aspect system. Dead code path that will never be called with meaningful data.
details.suggested_fix: Remove or rename to generic event logger
